overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting slow exploration of a cozy rustic cottage interior with wooden barrels and warm lighting, transitioning to a stormy night exterior. The camera moves around the stone cottage, revealing lantern-lit patios and a dramatic sky before circling to the rear of the building.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a cozy, dimly lit attic space filled with wooden barrels, rustic furniture, and warm candlelight from iron chandeliers. The space features a thatched ceiling, wooden plank floors, and various stored goods including red clay jugs on shelves.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the stormy exterior of the stone cottage, where warm lantern light contrasts against the dark blue storm clouds. The camera pans right around the building, revealing a wooden table with glowing lanterns and a wicker basket, while a distant tower looms in the background. A sudden bright flash illuminates the landscape at 40.5 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: cottage rear with massive stone buttress and tree roots

segments.scene_description: The camera circles to the rear of the cottage, revealing a dramatic stone buttress integrated with massive tree roots. The warm interior lights still glow from the windows as the stormy sky continues to churn overhead, with distant lights visible across the dark landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate warmth of a rustic attic into the dramatic atmosphere of a stormy night exterior. It begins by gliding through a dimly lit attic space filled with wooden barrels, red clay jugs, and the soft glow of candlelight beneath a thatched ceiling. As the camera moves outward, the cozy interior gives way to the dark blue hues of a storm, panning across a stone cottage patio where glowing lanterns on a wooden table contrast with a looming distant tower. A sudden bright flash of lightning illuminates the landscape before the camera circles toward the rear of the building. The scene finally settles on a massive stone buttress entwined with tree roots, while warm light continues to spill from the windows against a churning, dark sky.
